array.string: cd /Users/builtin.pb/Desktop/Template && export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/Users/builtin.pb/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin && export PYTHONPATH=/Users/builtin.pb/Desktop/Template/src${PYTHONPATH:+:$PYTHONPATH} && exec /Users/builtin.pb/Desktop/Template/.venv/bin/python -m slack_codex_router.main run
